chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.S-933 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 05.06.2018. Mr. Abdul Nasir Lakho, advocate for petitioners. Mr. Habib-ur-Rehman, Assistant Attorney General alongwith ASI Narain Das PS Tando Bhago. = Respondent No.4 files comments, taken on record. It is stated by learned A.A.G on behalf of official respondents that they will not harass the petitioner without due course of law. Learned counsel for the petitioners being satisfied with the statement does not press the instant petition. It is disposed of as such. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
